name: Kim Pine
description:
A drunken night with your friend on Valentine's Day...

(Okay, this time I actually know about she's from, I read the comics. I also wanted to make this bot for a while but you know, creativity is not my thing, but then I remembered that in a few days it would be valentine's day and that gave me the idea, and yeah, there's no dialogue because that's the only part when I struggle with like I said. Nothing much to say, enjoy it, and also happy valentine's day)

(And lastly, thanks for the 50 followers, I really appreciate it 💛)

Art by Inker_comics
